headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on Molina Healthcare, Raises Price Target to $235
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Stephen Baxter   maintains Molina Healthcare (NYSE:MOH) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $159 to $235.
